choices.name: Piercing Shot
choices.description: Unlocks Piercing Shot — ignores target defense entirely. Anti-tank ability.

choices.name: Pin Shot
choices.description: Unlocks Pin Shot — moderate damage + slow. Kiting tool.

choices.name: Volley
choices.description: Unlocks Volley — hit all enemies in a 2-tile radius. The Archer's only AoE.

choices.name: Disengage
choices.description: Unlocks Disengage — attack adjacent enemy then leap 2 tiles away.

choices.name: Snipe
choices.description: Unlocks Snipe — extreme range, extreme damage, ignores defense. Requires Piercing Shot.

choices.name: Rain of Arrows
choices.description: Unlocks Rain of Arrows — massive AoE devastation. Requires Volley.
